message:
feat: enable GPU preemption on all nightly E2E workflows (#810)

Add allow_gpu_preemption: true to all 10 nightly caller workflows
that were missing it (4 CKS callers already had it). This allows
nightly tests to preempt default-priority GPU workloads when GPUs
are scarce, preventing GPU starvation failures across OCP and GKE.

Depends on llm-d/llm-d-infra#40 which adds preemption support to
the OCP and GKE reusable workflows.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -38,5 +38,6 @@ jobs:
       pod_readiness_delay: 180
       httproute_file: httproute.gke.yaml
       image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      allow_gpu_preemption: true
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
     secrets: inherit

@@ -43,6 +43,7 @@ jobs:
       pod_wait_timeout: '30m'
       pod_readiness_delay: 180
       image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      allow_gpu_preemption: true
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
       pre_deploy_script: |
         echo "Adding H100 nodeSelector for OCP deployment..."

@@ -67,5 +67,6 @@ jobs:
         echo "Slim transform applied — model: Qwen3-0.6B, 1 GPU decode, 1 prefill replica"
         cd "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"
       image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      allow_gpu_preemption: true
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
     secrets: inherit

@@ -72,5 +72,6 @@ jobs:
         echo "Slim transform applied — model: Qwen3-0.6B, 1 GPU decode, 1 prefill replica"
         cd "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"
       image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      allow_gpu_preemption: true
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
     secrets: inherit

@@ -43,6 +43,7 @@ jobs:
       pod_wait_timeout: '30m'
       pod_readiness_delay: 180
       image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      allow_gpu_preemption: true
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
       pre_deploy_script: |
         echo "Adding H100 nodeSelector for OCP deployment..."

@@ -43,5 +43,6 @@ jobs:
       pod_wait_timeout: '10m'
       pod_readiness_delay: 0
       image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      allow_gpu_preemption: true
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
     secrets: inherit

@@ -100,5 +100,6 @@ jobs:
 
         echo "Deployment complete"
       image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      allow_gpu_preemption: true
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
     secrets: inherit

@@ -92,5 +92,6 @@ jobs:
       # Wide-EP-specific validation: check prefill + decode pods
       e2e_validate_args: '-v'
       image_override: 'ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-cuda-dev:latest'
+      allow_gpu_preemption: true
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
     secrets: inherit

@@ -278,5 +278,6 @@ jobs:
 
         echo "Deployment complete"
